ip_outcome_note: Card name explicitly reads 'God Charge Vegeta'. Blue upswept hair, white chest armor over dark bodysuit, forward-thrust energy-gathering pose — all canonical identifiers of Vegeta in Super Saiyan Blue (Super Saiyan God Super Saiyan) form from Dragon Ball Super. Confirmed via card name, Wikipedia Vegeta entry, and Dragon Ball Wiki sources.

trivia_bullets.text: God Charge Vegeta (BT1-036) is a Rare card in Galactic Battle, the inaugural Dragon Ball Super Card Game set (released July 28, 2017). Rare cards comprise 12 of the 114-card set. [PSA CardFacts: 2017 Dragon Ball Z Dragon Ball Super Series 1 Galactic Battle]
sources: PSA CardFacts: 2017 Dragon Ball Super Series 1 Galactic Battle

trivia_bullets.text: The 'God Charge' title and blue-aura visual reference Vegeta's Super Saiyan Blue form — officially named 'Super Saiyan God Super Saiyan' by Akira Toriyama in his original character designs — achieved by combining Super Saiyan God ki with a standard Super Saiyan transformation. The anime and Dragon Ball Super manga popularized the shorter name 'Super Saiyan Blue.' [Game Rant: Dragon Ball Super Saiyan Blue Explained]
sources: Game Rant: Dragon Ball: Super Saiyan Blue, Explained
CBR: Every Super Saiyan Vegeta Form in Chronological Order

trivia_bullets.text: Vegeta achieved Super Saiyan God ki while training under Whis, reaching Super Saiyan Blue without going through the five-Saiyan ritual that Goku used for Super Saiyan God — a route driven entirely by Vegeta's individualist pride and refusal to rely on a group transformation. [Kanzenshuu: Exactly 'HOW' did Vegeta achieve Super Saiyan God while training under Whis?]
sources: Kanzenshuu: Exactly HOW did Vegeta achieve Super Saiyan God while training under Whis

trivia_bullets.text: The 'charge' mechanic in the card name mirrors Vegeta's combat style of ki-charge attacks (Final Flash, Galick Gun) rather than instinctive techniques, emphasizing discipline and accumulated power over Goku's reflex-driven approach — a contrast Toriyama built into the two characters from the Saiyan Saga onward. [CBR: Dragon Ball: How Vegeta Achieved Super Saiyan God]
sources: CBR: Dragon Ball: How Vegeta Achieved Super Saiyan God

related_cards.name: Trunks
related_cards.note: Vegeta is Trunks' father; both Saiyan-type in same set

related_cards.name: Tenacious Vegeta
related_cards.note: Second Vegeta card in BT1, different rarity/moment
